data.text/markdown:
Narrative layer

Semantic search + topic clustering over persisted post embeddings (paraphrase-multilingual-mpnet-base-v2, handles English / Swahili / Sheng). Run embed_new to cover the full corpus before reading topics - clusters sharpen with more data.
